context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the integrate-api-client instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: EVERY layer (Auth, Client, Fetcher, Builder, Entity) MUST have its test

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write the spec (instance_double for unit, hash factories for API responses)

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run the spec — verify it fails because the layer does not exist yet

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Create a FactoryBot hash factory in `spec/factories/module_name/` (use `skip_create` + `initialize_with` — see [LAYERS.md §6](./LAYERS.md) for the pattern)

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write spec in `spec/services/module_name/` covering `.fetcher`, `.find`/`.search`
